features.title: EXTRAIT DE PARFUM CONCENTRATION
features.description: While standard designer fragrances typically dilute to a 10–15% Eau de Parfum concentration, we formulate at a dense 20%+. This delivers maximum projection and exceptional longevity that genuinely outlasts the original.

features.title: OLFACТORY ACCURACY
features.description: We reverse-engineer the exact molecular blueprints of exclusive designer scents to deliver a high-fidelity, indistinguishable scent profile without the premium markup.

features.title: FREE DELIVERY
features.description: Enjoy accelerated, free shipping on all orders nationwide with no minimum spend required. Delivered, in 2-3 days, straight to your doorstep.

features.title: SIDE EFFECT:COMPLIMENTS
features.description: Consider yourself warned. Our high-concentration blends leave an undeniable scent trail. We take no responsibility for the endless "what are you wearing?" questions you are about to receive.

features.title: IMPORTED FRENCH OILS
features.description: Proudly blended in South Africa using premium, meticulously sourced French oils. We bring world-class raw ingredients and expert craftsmanship to every single bottle.

features.title: PROPERLY MACERATED
features.description: Every batch undergoes a strict maceration process to let the raw oils and alcohol perfectly mature. This eliminates harsh openings for a flawlessly smooth profile.

trust_banner.title: Free, Accelerated Delivery Nationwide
trust_banner.description: Swift Courier dispatch direct to your door anywhere in South Africa at no extra costs.

trust_banner.title: Trusted Clone Brand
trust_banner.description: Soon to be selling on Takealot and Amazon. Studio Extrait has 100% premium quality formulation matching original scents. Safe and secure checkout options using PayFast, Google and Apple Pay.
